center.name: 聖卡塔琳娜島
center.summary: 聖卡塔琳娜島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括蓝肩裸鼻雀，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The azure-shouldered tanager prefers forested habitats more than other Thraupis tanagers and inhabits humid montane forests, open woodlands, secondary growth, and forest edges. On Santa Catarina Island, it has also been recorded from orchards. It is mainly found on the Atlantic slopes of Serra do Mar
